steps.title: Identify the central finding
steps.content: The text centers on a forecasting problem in fashion and a research finding: combining sellers' own data with social media information improves forecast accuracy and helps retailers meet demand without overstocking.

steps.title: Reject distorted summaries
steps.content: Choice B overstates social media and ignores sellers' data. Choice C turns overstocking into the main focus rather than a benefit of better forecasting. Choice D omits the social media data source. The answer is A.
